issue: parseIntentSignals entry regex [^}]* cannot parse nested braces in intent-signal values. For KEY: {weight:1, keywords:[a], meta:{priority:high}}, [^}]* stops at first } inside the meta object, truncating keywords before kwMatch can find them.
fix: Replace [^}]* with a brace-depth-tracking parser or nested-regex to handle one level of nesting, or switch to Function('return{'+body+'}') with try/catch fallback.

issue: kwMatch regex [^\]]* cannot parse nested brackets in keyword arrays. For keywords: [a, [b, c]], [^\]]* stops at inner ], causing quotedStrings to extract only 'a' and 'b', silently dropping 'c'.
fix: Use a bracket-depth-tracking parser for the keywords array, or restrict SKILL.md format to flat keyword arrays only and document the constraint.

issue: extractDictBody indexOf('{') finds the first { after name=, but does not skip string literals. If DEFAULT_RESOURCE path contains a brace (e.g., style/{id}.css), depth tracking starts at the wrong position, producing null or a wrong substring.
fix: Track whether characters fall inside a quoted string; skip string content when searching for structural braces, or normalize/escape brace sequences in paths before lookup.

issue: Early-return path (missing SKILL.md) sets score:0. Normal path for same condition would produce score:60 (one P0=40 penalty). gateFailed:true masks the inconsistency but returned score is mathematically inconsistent with the penalty formula, confusing for debugging.
fix: Harmonize early-return score with the penalty formula (score:60) or refactor so both code paths share the same scoring logic.

issue: D1-intra uses hard-coded 0.4/0.6 weights for intentRecall/resourceRecall with no justification comment. Comment at line 16 says D1=25 (inter12+intra13) but does not explain how 0.4/0.6 maps to the 13-point intra allocation.
fix: Add a comment explaining the 0.4/0.6 rationale and confirming it sums correctly to the 13-point D1-intra weight.
